company_core.products: Saviynt offers a cloud-based identity management platform that integrates identity governance, application access governance, and privileged access management to improve security and compliance for enterprises. The platform utilizes advanced technologies to facilitate granular access control, manage identity lifecycles, and implement Zero Trust principles across multi-cloud environments.

founders.name: Amit Saha
founders.background:
Amit Saha has a diverse background in banking and finance, having served as a Branch Manager at Chhattisgarh Rajya Gramin Bank from 2013 to 2017 and as an Assistant Manager at both INGVYSYA Bank and Yes Bank in 2010-2011. He began his career as a Business Analyst at Knex Inc. from 2017 to 2018. Amit holds a degree from Barkatullah Vishwavidyalaya.

---
Sources: linkedin.com/in/amit-saha-7a259a4

key_signals.description: Growing team: +7.8% headcount in 90 days (1,516 employees)

Saviynt has announced new Amazon Q integrations that enhance AI workflows for identity teams, signaling a focus on advanced identity security solutions. Additionally, the company recognized its top partners with the 2025 Partner Awards, highlighting strategic partnerships that may drive future growth.

competitors.description: The company offers a data security platform that automates data access governance and management, streamlining processes such as data onboarding, policy creation, and access approvals through integrated workflows. It utilizes technologies for granular access control, continuous monitoring of queries
competitors.tags: Analytics & Business Intelligence Platforms, Life Sciences & Healthcare, Data Infrastructure & Cloud Services, Communications & Information Technology, Healthcare Data & EHR Technology

competitors.description: The company provides a SaaS security platform designed to prevent data breaches by ensuring deep visibility and real-time risk detection across various SaaS applications. It utilizes technologies such as identity and access management, threat detection, and configuration management to address risks
competitors.tags: Security Software & Services, Business (B2B), Cybersecurity, Software, Service

competitors.description: The product is a platform designed for managing identity controls across self-hosted and SaaS applications, focusing on continuous monitoring and compliance. It utilizes advanced AI analytics and modern authentication protocols to assess and improve identity governance and risk management.
competitors.tags: Security Software & Services, Business (B2B), Cybersecurity, Software, Service

agent_output.subject: Saviynt's Amazon Q integration
agent_output.message:
Amit—

I am a former Meta AI researcher now investing in data/AI/infra at NEA. I came across your Amazon Q integration announcement and was struck by the approach – embedding AI directly into identity workflows is exactly where this space needs to go.

I'm curious how you're thinking about the roadmap here. Are you building toward agentic access governance, where the system can reason about policy decisions in real-time? That feels like the biggest gap in the identity space right now.

Would love to chat if you're open to it.

Madison
NEA
